indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a stable, non-slip surface suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: unobstructed floor area
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for a variety of yoga poses without obstruction.

indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is placed in the middle of the room, potentially obstructing the open floor space.

indicators.name: plant in corner
indicators.rationale: The plant in the corner could potentially obstruct the open floor space if moved.

reasoning_summary: The hardwood flooring and unobstructed floor area are positive indicators for yoga practice. However, the presence of a couch and a plant in the corner could potentially obstruct the open floor space, reducing the suitability of the space for yoga.
